title: TheSacryMod
description: This mod adds a lot to your Minecraft adventure ! New foods, armors and boss, come try it !
body:
Welcome to The Sacry Mod !
This mod adds lots to your game : new armors, new boss, new foods, and way more soon !

Ever thought minecraft misses some crucial features or more customization possibilities ? Or even armors ? TheSacryMod's here for you !

Adding a copper armor, bamboo bread, a Corrupted Copper Biome and Mob, and new features soon 

You can freely add it to your modpacks :)
